name: MCP Products (Streamable HTTP)
description: Expose Qbu-Crawler MCP server as OpenClaw agent tools for product data scraping and analysis

primaryUserId.description: Primary operator user id. Only this user is allowed to be addressed as Leo by default.

primaryUserName.description: Primary operator display name used when the current speaker is clearly that person.

addressingContextEnabled.description: Inject current-speaker context before prompt build so the agent addresses people by the right nickname instead of defaulting to Leo.
